languages.text: Until the end of the turn, wearer's melee attacks deal an additional +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} shock damage. This ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped. To use this ability, the wearer must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Until the end of the turn, wearer's melee attacks deal an additional +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} shock damage. This ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped. To use this ability, the wearer must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

This ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped. To use this ability, the wearer must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.
languages.original_text: Until the end of the turn, wearer's melee attacks deal an additional +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} shock damage. This ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped. To use this ability, the wearer must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text:
When activated, all {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks are removed, and the wearer's melee attacks gain +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} shock damage.
The ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped.

Until the end of the turn, the wearer's melee attacks deal an additional +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} shock damage. This ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped. To use this ability, the wearer must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

Until the end of the turn, the wearer's melee attacks deal an additional +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} shock damage. This ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped. To use this ability, the wearer must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

languages.text: До конца хода атаки персонажа в {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнем бою{/g} наносят +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} дополнительно. Эта {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способность{/g} доступна только при наличии оружия ближнего боя. Для использования этой способности у Эоганна должно быть не менее 1 уровня {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}. Он снимается после использования.
languages.original_text: Until the end of the turn, the wearer's melee attacks deal an additional +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} shock damage. This ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped. To use this ability, the wearer must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text:
При активации все уровни {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g} снимаются, а атаки персонажа {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}в ближнем бою{/g} наносят +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} дополнительно.
Эта {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способность{/g} доступна только при наличии оружия ближнего боя.

При активации все уровни {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g} снимаются, а атаки персонажа {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}в ближнем бою{/g} наносят +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} дополнительно.
Эта {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способность{/g} доступна только при наличии оружия ближнего боя.

languages.text: Bis zum Ende des Zuges verursachen die Nahkampfangriffe des Trägers zusätzlich +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} Schockschaden. Diese Fähigkeit ist nur aktiv, wenn der Träger eine Nahkampfwaffe ausgerüstet hat. Für den Einsatz dieser Fähigkeit braucht der Träger mindestens 1 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}, die anschließend entfernt wird.
languages.original_text: Until the end of the turn, the wearer's melee attacks deal an additional +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} shock damage. This ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped. To use this ability, the wearer must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Bis zum Ende des Zuges verursachen die Nahkampfangriffe des Trägers zusätzlich +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} Schockschaden. Diese Fähigkeit ist nur aktiv, wenn der Träger eine Nahkampfwaffe ausgerüstet hat. Für den Einsatz dieser Fähigkeit braucht der Träger mindestens 1 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}, die anschließend entfernt wird.

Wenn aktiviert, wird −1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}-Stapel des Trägers entfernt. Bis zum Ende des Zuges verursachen seine Nahkampfangriffe zusätzlich +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} Schockschaden.
Diese Fähigkeit ist nur aktiv, wenn der Träger eine Nahkampfwaffe ausgerüstet hat.

languages.text: Hasta el final del turno, los ataques cuerpo a cuerpo del portador infligen +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} de daño de conmoción adicional. Esta capacidad solo está activa cuando el portador tiene un arma cuerpo a cuerpo equipada. Para usar esta capacidad, el portador debe tener al menos 1 acumulación de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}, que se elimina tras su uso.
languages.original_text: Until the end of the turn, the wearer's melee attacks deal an additional +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} shock damage. This ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped. To use this ability, the wearer must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Hasta el final del turno, los ataques cuerpo a cuerpo del portador infligen +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} de daño de conmoción adicional. Esta capacidad solo está activa cuando el portador tiene un arma cuerpo a cuerpo equipada. Para usar esta capacidad, el portador debe tener al menos 1 acumulación de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}, que se elimina tras su uso.

Al activarlo, se pierde 1 acumulación de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g} del usuario. Hasta el final de turno, sus ataques cuerpo a cuerpo infligen +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} de daño de conmoción.
Esta capacidad solo está activa cuando el portador tiene un arma cuerpo a cuerpo equipada.

languages.text: Takan kişinin yakın dövüş saldırıları, ilave +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} şok hasarı verir. Etkisi turun sonuna dek sürer. Bu kabiliyet, takan kişi yalnızca yakın dövüş silahı kuşanmışsa aktiftir. Takan kişinin bu kabiliyeti kullanabilmesi için en az 1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi olması gerekir ve kullanım sonrası bu potansiyel enerji ortadan kalkar.
languages.original_text: Until the end of the turn, the wearer's melee attacks deal an additional +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} shock damage. This ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped. To use this ability, the wearer must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Takan kişinin yakın dövüş saldırıları, ilave +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} şok hasarı verir. Etkisi turun sonuna dek sürer. Bu kabiliyet, takan kişi yalnızca yakın dövüş silahı kuşanmışsa aktiftir. Takan kişinin bu kabiliyeti kullanabilmesi için en az 1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi olması gerekir ve kullanım sonrası bu potansiyel enerji ortadan kalkar.

Etkinleştirildiğinde, giyen kişi üzerindeki 1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi ortadan kalkar. Bir sonraki turuna kadar yakın dövüş saldırıları, ilave +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} şok hasarı verir.
Bu kabiliyet, takan kişi yalnızca yakın dövüş silahı kuşanmışsa aktiftir.

languages.text: 直到回合结束，装备者的近战攻击额外造成{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d}点电击伤害。 此能力仅在装备者装备近战武器时生效。 装备者至少拥有1层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}，才能使用此能力，使用后消耗1层。
languages.original_text: Until the end of the turn, the wearer's melee attacks deal an additional +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} shock damage. This ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped. To use this ability, the wearer must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: 直到回合结束，装备者的近战攻击额外造成{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d}点电击伤害。 此能力仅在装备者装备近战武器时生效。 装备者至少拥有1层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}，才能使用此能力，使用后消耗1层。

languages.text: Jusqu'à la fin du tour, les attaques de mêlée de l'utilisateur infligent +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} points de dégâts d'électrocution supplémentaires. Cette capacité est active uniquement lorsque l'utilisateur est équipé d'une arme de mêlée. Pour utiliser cette capacité, l'utilisateur doit disposer d'au moins 1 cumul d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}, qui sera consommé.
languages.original_text: Until the end of the turn, the wearer's melee attacks deal an additional +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} shock damage. This ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped. To use this ability, the wearer must have at least 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which is removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Jusqu'à la fin du tour, les attaques de mêlée de l'utilisateur infligent +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} points de dégâts d'électrocution supplémentaires. Cette capacité est active uniquement lorsque l'utilisateur est équipé d'une arme de mêlée. Pour utiliser cette capacité, l'utilisateur doit disposer d'au moins 1 cumul d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}, qui sera consommé.

Lors de l'activation, -1 cumul d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}énergie potentielle{/g} est retiré de l'utilisateur. Jusqu'à la fin du tour, ses attaques de mêlée infligent +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} points de dégâts d'électrocution supplémentaires.
Cette capacité est active uniquement lorsque l'utilisateur est équipé d'une arme de mêlée.

languages.text:
使用すると、-1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}ポテンシャルエネルギー{/g} が装備者に消費される。ターン終了まで、装備者の近接攻撃は+ {uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} 衝撃ダメージを追加する。
この能力は、装備者が近接武器を装備している時のみ有効。
languages.original_text:
When activated, −1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stack is removed from the wearer. Until the end of the turn, their melee attacks deal an additional +{uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} shock damage.
This ability is active only when the wearer has a melee weapon equipped.

traits.locale_text:
使用すると、-1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}ポテンシャルエネルギー{/g} が装備者に消費される。ターン終了まで、装備者の近接攻撃は+ {uip|Damage|bb2cd5c2559b403a94ef064d34b24b3d} 衝撃ダメージを追加する。
この能力は、装備者が近接武器を装備している時のみ有効。
